SetBonus.4: When the equipper uses an <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, their Anomaly Proficiency increases by 25, stacking up to 2 times, and lasting 40s; repeated triggers reset the duration. When the equipper triggers <color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</color>, their DMG increases by 18% for 40s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
